thig6.7:1.1: [The Buddha admonished me:] Guttā, devote yourself to the goal for which you went forth,
thig6.7:1.2: having discarded [hope] for a dear son of your own.
thig6.7:1.4: Don’t fall under the sway of the mind.
thig6.7:2.2: beings in love with Māra’s realm,
thig6.7:2.4:
unknowing.
Abandoning these lower fetters, nun—
thig6.7:4.4: you won’t come to this again.
thig6.7:5.4: you will make an end of suffering & stress.
thig6.7:6.3: free from hunger in the right-here-&-now
thig6.7:6.4: you will go about totally calmed.
